executives.name: Alan Campbell
executives.background: Alan Campbell has served as a director since 2015 and as Chairman of the Board since 2017. He was previously the Chief Financial Officer of Freescale Semiconductor from 2004 to 2014.

board_of_directors.background: Alan Campbell has served as a director since 2015 and as Chairman of the Board since 2017. He was previously the Chief Financial Officer of Freescale Semiconductor from 2004 to 2014.
